title: RSA Encryption Process
description: Encrypt message using RSA public-key cryptography
mermaid: graph TD A1[Generate Two Large Primes p and q] --> B1(Calculate n = p * q) style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 --> C1["Calculate the totient of n: φ(n) = (p-1) * (q-1)"] style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C1 --> D1["Choose an integer e such that 1 < e < φ(n) and gcd(e, φ(n)) = 1"] style D1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 D1 --> E1{Is gcd(e, φ(n)) = 1?} style E1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 E1 -- Yes --> F1["Calculate d, the modular multiplicative inverse of e modulo φ(n): d ≡ e^-1 (mod φ(n))"] style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 -- No --> D1 F1 --> G1["Public Key: (n, e)"] style G1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff F1 --> H1["Private Key: (n, d)"] style H1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff I1[Input Message M (M < n)] --> J1(Encryption: C = M^e mod n) style I1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1 --> K1(Ciphertext C) style K1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff L1[Ciphertext C] --> M1(Decryption: M = C^d mod n) style L1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style M1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff M1 --> N1(Original Message M) style N1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff G1 --> J1 H1 --> M1
entities: Generate Two Large Primes p and q

/"Calculate n = p * q"/)style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 B1 --> C1(/"Calculate the totient of n: φ(n) = (p-1) * (q-1)"/)style C1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff C1 --> D1(/"Choose an integer e such that 1 < e < φ(n) and gcd(e, φ(n)) = 1"/)style D1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 D1 --> E1{/"Is gcd(e, φ(n)) = 1?"/}style E1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 E1 -- Yes --> F1(/"Calculate d, the modular multiplicative inverse of e modulo φ(n): d ≡ e^-1 (mod φ(n))"/)style F1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 -- No --> D1 F1 --> G1(/"Public Key: (n, e)"/)style G1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff F1 --> H1(/"Private Key: (n, d)"/)style H1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff I1[Input Message M (M < n)
/"Encryption: C = M^e mod n"/)style I1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style J1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff J1 --> K1(/"Ciphertext C"/)style K1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff L1[Ciphertext C
/"Decryption: M = C^d mod n"/)style L1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style M1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff M1 --> N1(/"Original Message M"/
